name: wool_no_ads_premium
description: Premium Wool Crush bundle: the cream felt ADS prohibition patch crowned by two crossed golden knitting needles, garnished with one golden yarn-ball currency and one turquoise crochet-hook hint token, all tied together by a raspberry ribbon bow.
prompt_extra: one compact premium crest; requested text is exactly ADS; the three product identities stay individually readable; no gems, metal coins, extra words or count labels

variants.name: bundle
variants.prompt_extra: slightly looser cozy craft bundle with larger product icons
